Nobody told me that my "depression" was actually just my gut leaking poison into my bloodstream

Went to the doctor. Told him I felt flat, unmotivated, tired all the time, no interest in anything. He gave me a 10-minute questionnaire. I scored above a line on a piece of paper. He

“hey Lotts, i know you’re super busy with demo day coming up but i checked your website and i see you don’t have an animated explainer video, my company does animated videos can we jump on a call for a quick 30min to discuss how we can collaborate!”

Meanwhile, Lindsey Graham has said Cuba can be next.

I deleted my AI stack after using this one tool

New YT video dropped

BREAKING: Berkley study tracked 200 employees for 8 months and found AI doesn’t save time. It makes you work more.

I believe it. One of the biggest reasons? Friction.

You open ChatGPT. Spend 5 minutes re-explaining who you are, what your business does, your tone, your

Here’s the cycle that traps you. 

AI speeds up a task → expectations for speed rise → you rely more on AI → you take on wider scope → workload intensifies → repeat

The part most people will miss from this paper:

Developers who delegated everything to AI scored below 40%. But developers who used AI to ask conceptual questions and understand the code scored above 65%.

Same tool. Completely different outcomes.

The problem isn’t AI coding.

he’s actually right but for the wrong reasons

benchmarks are quickly becoming useless

not because openai is too good for them

but because every lab is just benchmaxxing way too hard now

the only thing that matters is what people can actually build with the tools

and devs

the world is going AI-native. follow along so you don't get left behind. turn on notifications.
